creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
> Maintainer of dns/ldns,

    > Please note that PR ports/171934 has just been submitted.

Thanks for the converting the makefile to use the OptionsNG framework.
I was planning to do that when the port would be updated. The
developers tell me that they will have a new version with bug fixes
and feature enhancements later to day of tomorrow.

Therefore I propose not to issue a revision but wait for the new
updated version. Again, thanks for the work, it will save me quite
some time.

Regards,

	jaap
